items.title_en: Three die in Mexico City World Cup celebrations
items.title_zh: 三人在墨西哥城世界杯庆祝活动中死亡
items.desc_en: More than one million people took to the streets of Mexico City on Tuesday to mark the country's win over Ecuador.
items.desc_zh: 周二，超过一百万人走上墨西哥城街头，庆祝该国战胜厄瓜多尔。

items.title_en: Demand for riskier mortgages drops, as their advantages shrink
items.title_zh: 由于优势缩小，对风险较高的抵押贷款的需求下降
items.desc_en: The spread between the 30-year fixed rate mortgage and adjustable rate loans is narrowing, causing demand for ARMs to weaken.
items.desc_zh: 30 年期固定利率抵押贷款和可调利率贷款之间的利差正在缩小，导致对 ARM 的需求减弱。

items.title_en: Grindr is launching two products that make the stock attractive, says Morgan Stanley
items.title_zh: 摩根士丹利表示，Grindr 正在推出两款产品，使该股具有吸引力
items.desc_en: Investors should scoop up LGBT-focused dating app Grindr as the company rolls out two new products that can drive shares higher, according to Morgan Stanley.
items.desc_zh: 摩根士丹利表示，投资者应该买入专注于 LGBT 的约会应用程序 Grindr，因为该公司推出了两款可以推高股价的新产品。

items.title_en: Tech leads first half stock gains — but the biggest winners weren't in the U.S.
items.title_zh: 科技股引领上半年股市上涨，但最大的赢家并非在美国
items.desc_en: U.S. Big Tech stocks enjoyed strong gains — despite a sharp sell-off at the end of June — but were largely outperformed by their international counterparts.
items.desc_zh: 尽管美国大型科技股在 6 月底遭遇大幅抛售，但仍大幅上涨，但其表现在很大程度上优于国际同行。

items.title_en: Anthropic says Trump admin has lifted export controls on Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5
items.title_zh: Anthropic 表示特朗普政府已取消对《克劳德寓言 5》和《神话 5》的出口管制
items.desc_en: The U.S. Department of Commerce lifted the export controls on Anthropic's Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models
items.desc_zh: 美国商务部取消对 Anthropic 的《神鬼寓言 5》和《神话 5》机型的出口管制

items.title_en: Lamborghini reveals new Urus performance hybrid SUV after ditching EVs
items.title_zh: 兰博基尼放弃电动汽车后推出新款 Urus 高性能混合动力 SUV
items.desc_en: Lamborghini is calling the new Urus SE Performante the "fastest Super SUV in the world."
items.desc_zh: 兰博基尼将新款 Urus SE Performante 称为“世界上最快的超级 SUV”。

items.title_en: Gold prices fall further after worst quarter in 13 years as interest rate fears hit bullion
items.title_zh: 由于利率担忧打击金价，金价在经历13年来最糟糕的季度后进一步下跌
items.desc_en: Gold fell further on Wednesday, with bullion continuing its slide after suffering its worst quarter since 2013.
items.desc_zh: 周三金价进一步下跌，在经历了 2013 年以来最糟糕的季度后，金价继续下滑。

items.title_en: In Colorado primaries, a democratic socialist wins; Bennet's governor bid ends - NPR
items.title_zh: 在科罗拉多州初选中，民主社会主义者获胜；班尼特州长竞选结束 - NPR

items.title_zh: 特朗普将搭乘卡塔尔赠送的空军一号进行首飞 - 华尔街日报

items.desc_zh: 特朗普将乘坐卡塔尔赠送的空军一号进行首飞 华尔街日报特朗普计划下周乘坐卡塔尔赠送的空军一号进行首次飞行 Bloomberg.com 空军一号可以在北达科他州的哪里降落？  狄更斯夫妇

items.title_en: Tom Kean Jr. kept his depression a secret. Colleagues are questioning that decision. - Politico
items.title_zh: 小汤姆·基恩 (Tom Kean Jr.) 对自己的抑郁症保密。同事们对这一决定提出质疑。 - 政治报

items.desc_zh: 小汤姆·基恩 (Tom Kean Jr.) 对自己的抑郁症保密。同事们对这一决定提出质疑。  Politico 失踪的美国国会议员解释了神秘缺席四个月的原因 BBC 对于许多美国人来说，抑郁症是家常便饭

items.title_en: Oil prices wobble as breakdown in U.S.-Iran talks casts doubt over peace process
items.title_zh: 美伊谈判破裂引发对和平进程的怀疑，油价波动
items.desc_en: Oil prices were lower on Wednesday after Iran said it would not meet with U.S. delegates for talks in Qatar, amplifying concern about the peace process.
items.desc_zh: 伊朗表示不会与美国代表在卡塔尔举行会谈，加剧了人们对和平进程的担忧，周三油价走低。

items.title_en: Donald Trump made $1.4bn in crypto income in 2025, raising his net worth - Al Jazeera
items.title_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普在 2025 年获得 14 亿美元的加密货币收入，增加了他的净资产 - 半岛电视台
items.desc_en: Donald Trump made $1.4bn in crypto income in 2025, raising his net worth  Al JazeeraTrump Pulled in at Least $2.2 Billion in 2025, Financial Disclosure Shows  The New York TimesWhite House rejects con
items.desc_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普 (Donald Trump) 在 2025 年获得了 14 亿美元的加密货币收入，从而增加了他的净资产 半岛电视台 财务披露显示，特朗普在 2025 年至少获得了 22 亿美元的加密货币收入 白宫拒绝了这一骗局

items.title_en: Why is crucial tech vulnerable to the heat?
items.title_zh: 为什么关键技术容易受到高温影响？
items.desc_en: Energy grids and train services are among the vital services that are vulnerable to very hot weather.
items.desc_zh: 能源网和火车服务是容易受到酷热天气影响的重要服务。

items.title_en: Sudan's RSF committed crimes against humanity in el-Fasher, Amnesty says
items.title_zh: 国际特赦组织称，苏丹快速支援部队在法希尔犯下反人类罪
items.desc_en: The Amnesty report adds to evidence of atrocities in el-Fasher, which the UN says bore the hallmarks of genocide.
items.desc_zh: 国际特赦组织的报告增加了法希尔暴行的证据，联合国称该地区具有种族灭绝的特征。

items.title_en: Employers who laid off workers citing AI are already starting to regret it
items.title_zh: 以人工智能为由解雇员工的雇主已经开始后悔
items.desc_en: Companies are realizing artificial intelligence can't do everything after all, prompting them to rehire employees to grow their businesses
items.desc_zh: 公司意识到人工智能毕竟不能做所有事情，促使他们重新雇用员工来发展业务

items.title_zh: 乌克兰无人机袭击炼油厂使俄罗斯陷入夏季燃料危机 - 美联社新闻

items.title_en: Iran says it is selling oil at 20% premium as end of U.S. blockade sees 40 million barrels exported
items.title_zh: 伊朗表示，随着美国封锁结束，伊朗石油出口量达到4000万桶，其溢价为20%
items.desc_en: The ceasefire prompted a surge in crude shipments through the Strait of Hormuz, where traffic had largely ground to a halt during the conflict.
items.desc_zh: 停火促使霍尔木兹海峡的原油运输量激增，该海峡的交通在冲突期间基本陷入停滞。

items.title_zh: 特朗普取消了对 Anthropic 神话和寓言模型的限制 - TechCrunch

items.title_zh: 教授因批评查理柯克而被解雇后达成 190 万美元和解协议 - 《华盛顿邮报》

items.title_en: Trump made more than $1bn from crypto in first year back in office
items.title_zh: 特朗普上任第一年就从加密货币中赚取了超过 10 亿美元
items.desc_en: The president earned millions more from real estate, Trump-themed Bibles, watches and other items.
items.desc_zh: 总统从房地产、特朗普主题的圣经、手表和其他物品中赚取了数百万美元。

items.title_en: Anthropic says US lifts export ban on its advanced AI tools
items.title_zh: Anthropic 称美国取消对其先进人工智能工具的出口禁令
items.desc_en: Fable and Mythos were abruptly suspended in June over concerns that they could be used by hackers.
items.desc_zh: 由于担心黑客可能利用《寓言》和《神话》，它们在 6 月份突然被暂停。

items.title_en: Afghan Taliban launch strikes on border with Pakistan as tensions escalate
items.title_zh: 随着紧张局势升级，阿富汗塔利班对与巴基斯坦边境发动袭击
items.desc_en: Pakistan's military says it shot down four rudimentary drones and will respond to any further provocation.
items.desc_zh: 巴基斯坦军方表示，他们击落了四架简陋的无人机，并将对任何进一步的挑衅做出回应。

items.title_en: US envoys in Doha to meet mediators but not Iranians, Qatar says
items.title_zh: 卡塔尔表示，美国驻多哈特使将与调解人会面，但不会与伊朗人会面
items.desc_en: Qatar's foreign ministry spokesman says no high-level meetings or direct talks between the US and Iran are scheduled.
items.desc_zh: 卡塔尔外交部发言人表示，美国和伊朗之间没有安排高层会议或直接会谈。

items.title_en: US envoys in Doha to meet mediators but not Iranians, Qatar says - BBC
items.title_zh: 卡塔尔表示，美国驻多哈特使将与调解人会面，但不会与伊朗人会面 - BBC
items.desc_en: US envoys in Doha to meet mediators but not Iranians, Qatar says  BBCIran war live: Qatar’s PM meets US envoys; Tehran holds firm on conditions  Al JazeeraUS Says Witkoff, Kushner Had Positive Talks i
items.desc_zh: 卡塔尔称，美国特使在多哈会见调解人，但不会见伊朗人德黑兰对条件坚持立场 半岛电视台称威特科夫和库什纳进行了积极会谈

items.title_en: A plane crashed into a tower in Beijing but China is not saying what happened
items.title_zh: 一架飞机撞上北京的一座塔楼，但中国没有透露发生了什么
items.desc_en: The collision left holes on the side of the tower, but Beijing has scrubbed other visible traces of the incident.
items.desc_zh: 碰撞在塔的一侧留下了洞，但北京已经清除了该事件的其他明显痕迹。

items.title_en: E-scooters being advertised for commuting despite UK road ban
items.title_zh: 尽管英国道路禁令，电动滑板车仍在做通勤广告
items.desc_en: A Press Association investigation found major retailers advertising e-scooters for "commuting" and "urban riding".
items.desc_zh: 新闻协会的一项调查发现，主要零售商为“通勤”和“城市骑行”的电动滑板车做广告。

items.title_zh: 马克龙最后任期结束后，法国确定总统选举日期 - France 24

items.title_en: Nike results top estimates even as China sales drop 12%; retailer expects $986 million tariff refund
items.title_zh: 尽管中国销售额下降 12%，耐克业绩仍高于预期；零售商预计获得 9.86 亿美元关税退款
items.desc_en: Nike was expected to report another quarter of declining sales as the sneaker giant struggles to regain strength under its turnaround strategy.
items.desc_zh: 耐克预计将报告另一个季度的销售额下降，因为这家运动鞋巨头在其扭亏为盈战略下努力恢复实力。

items.title_en: Michael Burry says he's shorting Caterpillar for the first time after it nearly doubled in the AI-driven rally of 2026
items.title_zh: 迈克尔·伯里 (Michael Burry) 表示，在 2026 年人工智能驱动的反弹中，卡特彼勒 (Caterpillar) 几乎翻了一番后，他首次做空卡特彼勒 (Caterpillar)
items.desc_en: "Caterpillar jumped out at me," Burry said. "I have never shorted Caterpillar. It has always done great for me on the long side in the past."
items.desc_zh: “毛毛虫向我扑来，”伯里说。 “我从未做空卡特彼勒。过去，它在做多方面一直对我有很大帮助。”

items.title_en: Three-year-old rescued and taken to hospital six days after Venezuela quake
items.title_zh: 委内瑞拉地震六天后，三岁儿童获救并送往医院
items.desc_en: Video footage shows rescuers cheering as the child is pulled from rubble in La Guaira state.
items.desc_zh: 视频片段显示，当孩子从拉瓜伊拉州的废墟中被救出时，救援人员欢呼雀跃。

items.title_en: Trump's annual financial disclosure shows more than $580M in crypto-related income
items.title_zh: 特朗普的年度财务披露显示其加密货币相关收入超过 5.8 亿美元
items.desc_en: Trump's 2025 financial disclosure report totals more than 900 pages detailing holdings in cryptocurrency and stocks.
items.desc_zh: 特朗普的 2025 年财务披露报告总计超过 900 页，详细介绍了加密货币和股票的持有情况。

items.desc_zh: 巴基斯坦补习中心屋顶倒塌，造成 14 名儿童死亡 路透社 警方称，巴基斯坦东部补习中心屋顶倒塌，造成至少 14 名儿童死亡

items.title_en: Thousands of anti-migrant protesters march in South Africa amid heavy police presence
items.title_zh: 南非数千名反移民抗议者在大量警察驻守下游行
items.desc_en: Foreigners have already left South Africa ahead of the deadline set by anti-migrant groups.
items.desc_zh: 外国人已经在反移民组织设定的最后期限之前离开南非。

items.title_en: Tech Life
items.title_zh: 科技生活
items.desc_en: We hear concerns that shadow banning is limiting access to health advice for women.
items.desc_zh: 我们听到有人担心影子禁令限制了女性获得健康建议的机会。

items.title_en: 'Absolute madness': Row over plan to demolish Nazi bunker under Berlin
items.title_zh: “绝对疯狂”：拆除柏林地下纳粹掩体的计划引发争议
items.desc_en: City officials want to build flats on the city centre site but others say it should be preserved as part of Germany's history.
items.desc_zh: 市政府官员希望在市中心建造公寓，但其他人则表示，它应该作为德国历史的一部分予以保留。

items.title_en: Big egg producers settle price inflation probe with DOJ for 53 million eggs — and $3.3M
items.title_zh: 大型鸡蛋生产商与司法部就 5300 万枚鸡蛋和 330 万美元的价格通胀调查达成和解
items.desc_en: Cal-Maine Foods, Versova and Hickman's Egg Ranch agreed to settle allegations of price manipulation by the Department of Justice and 17 states.
items.desc_zh: Cal-Maine Foods、Versova 和 Hickman's Egg Ranch 同意就司法部和 17 个州的价格操纵指控达成和解。

items.title_en: Australia sues Amazon for making allegedly unfair contracts with subscribers
items.title_zh: 澳大利亚起诉亚马逊涉嫌与订户签订不公平合同
items.desc_en: The Australian Competition and Consumer Commission (ACCC) says Amazon has broken consumer protection law
items.desc_zh: 澳大利亚竞争与消费者委员会（ACCC）称亚马逊违反了消费者保护法

items.title_en: Firefighters struggle to contain deadly Greek wildfire
items.title_zh: 消防员努力控制致命的希腊野火
items.desc_en: Over 100 firefighters are working to extinguish a fire near Thessaloniki which has claimed a life.
items.desc_zh: 超过 100 名消防员正在努力扑灭塞萨洛尼基附近的一场大火，这场大火已造成人员伤亡。

items.title_en: US Supreme Court upholds birthright citizenship in blow to Trump
items.title_zh: 美国最高法院维持与生俱来的公民身份，对特朗普造成打击
items.desc_en: The ruling is a major setback for Donald Trump's immigration agenda, and has been welcomed by civil rights groups.
items.desc_zh: 这项裁决是唐纳德·特朗普移民议程的重大挫折，并受到民权组织的欢迎。

items.title_en: American Airlines brings grab-and-go lounge to New York's JFK
items.title_zh: 美国航空为纽约肯尼迪机场提供即取即走休息室
items.desc_en: American Airlines is opening a grab-and-go lounge at New York's JFK
items.desc_zh: 美国航空将在纽约肯尼迪国际机场开设外带休息室

items.title_en: Roof collapse kills 14 schoolchildren in Pakistan
items.title_zh: 巴基斯坦屋顶倒塌造成14名学童死亡
items.desc_en: Two people are taken into custody after the incident at a tuition centre in the Kahna suburb of Lahore.
items.desc_zh: 事件发生后，拉合尔卡纳郊区的一个补习中心有两人被拘留。

items.title_en: GOP Rep. Tom Kean says depression diagnosis caused months-long absence from Congress
items.title_zh: 共和党众议员汤姆·基恩表示，抑郁症诊断导致他缺席国会数月
items.desc_en: New Jersey Rep. Tom Kean said he was diagnosed with depression, explaining a months-long absence from Congress in a competitive district in the midterm elections.
items.desc_zh: 新泽西州众议员汤姆·基恩 (Tom Kean) 表示，他被诊断出患有抑郁症，并解释了他在中期选举竞争激烈的选区缺席国会数月的原因。

items.title_en: US Supreme Court upholds bans on transgender women in female school and college sports
items.title_zh: 美国最高法院维持禁止跨性别女性参加女子学校和大学体育运动的禁令
items.desc_en: It rules that states can ban transgender athletes from competing in women's and girls' sports.
items.desc_zh: 它规定各州可以禁止变性运动员参加女子和女童运动。

items.desc_en: UK’s Starmer announces 300-billion-pound defence investment plan  Al JazeeraBurnham's chancellor will have to find extra £4.7bn for defence, says minister  BBCThe Guardian view on the defence investme
items.desc_zh: 英国斯塔默宣布 3000 亿英镑的国防投资计划 英国广播公司 (BBC) 大臣表示，半岛电视台伯纳姆财政大臣将不得不额外筹集 47 亿英镑用于国防

items.title_en: Why GTA 6 will launch without a disc - and what it means for gamers

items.desc_en: Music and films are now largely digital-only - does the lack of a disc for GTA 6 mean gaming is going the same way?
items.desc_zh: 音乐和电影现在基本上都是数字化的——《GTA 6》缺少光盘是否意味着游戏也会走同样的路？

items.title_en: Teens who hacked TfL were known to police years before cyber-attack
items.title_zh: 警方在网络攻击发生前几年就知道黑客入侵伦敦交通局的青少年
items.desc_en: Owen Flowers and Thalha Jubair were convicted for their roles in the attack, which led to large costs for Transport for London.
items.desc_zh: 欧文·弗劳尔斯（Owen Flowers）和塔哈·朱贝尔（Thalha Jubair）因参与袭击而被定罪，这给伦敦交通局带来了巨额损失。

items.title_en: Apple hikes MacBook and iPad prices, blaming rising chip costs
items.title_zh: 苹果提高MacBook和iPad价格，归咎于芯片成本上涨
items.desc_en: Apple said it had "never seen a component price increase this much, this quickly".
items.desc_zh: 苹果表示，“从未见过零部件价格上涨如此之快”。

items.title_en: IBM hails new 'block of flats' design breakthrough for ultra tiny chips
items.title_zh: IBM 欢呼超微型芯片的新“公寓”设计突破
items.desc_en: IBM says it has created the world's first known chip tech below 1 nanometre - but it will be some time before it's ready for production.
items.desc_zh: IBM 表示，它已经创造了世界上第一个已知的 1 纳米以下的芯片技术，但距离投入生产还需要一段时间。
